title: tk next: sort soft-deferred candidates last so selection skips to first feasible work
description:
Teach next-work selection to respect soft ordering without ever hiding feasible work.

Context: cmd/tk/cmd/next.go selects from query.Ready(...) for agent mode (~line 187) and from query.EpicsNeedingPlanning(...) as the planning fallback (~line 220), both sorted with query.SortByPriorityCreatedAt (internal/query/filter.go line 103: priority asc, then created_at asc). The Tick struct now has After []string (json "after,omitempty") — soft ordering: a tick with open after-targets is still ready; it should merely sort behind candidates whose after-targets are all closed.

Work:
- New helper in internal/query (new file softorder.go): SortBySoftOrderPriorityCreatedAt(ticks []tick.Tick, allTicks []tick.Tick). Stable sort with key order: (1) soft-deferred flag, false first — true iff any after-target exists in allTicks and is not closed (missing targets treated as closed, matching blocker semantics in ready.go); (2) priority ascending; (3) created_at ascending.
- Use the new sort in next.go for the agent-mode ready pool and the planning-candidate sort. Keep SortByPriorityCreatedAt for the --awaiting human mode (soft order is an agent-scheduling concern).
- End-to-end effect to verify: epics A (in_progress, long-running), B (blocked_by A, childless), C (after B, childless): tk next --epic returns C with action plan — feasibility skips past queued B, and soft order does not hide C when it is the only feasible epic.

Test cases:
- Two ready tasks, equal priority: t1 has after [<open tick>], t2 has none -> t2 sorts first.
- t1 has after [<closed tick>] -> not soft-deferred; plain priority/created_at order holds.
- Planning fallback with ready epics C (after open B) and D (no after), equal priority -> D first; with only C present -> C is still returned (never filtered).
- after-target id absent from the store -> treated as closed (not deferred).

Files likely touched: internal/query/softorder.go (new), internal/query/softorder_test.go (new), cmd/tk/cmd/next.go, cmd/tk/cmd/next_test.go.
Run: go test ./internal/query/... ./cmd/tk/...
acceptance_criteria: soft-deferred candidates sort last but are never excluded; tk next --epic returns the feasible epic C in the A/B/C long-runner scenario; go test ./internal/query/... ./cmd/tk/... passes
closed_reason: Completed: SortBySoftOrderPriorityCreatedAt (in_progress-first preserved, deferred flag primary, missing targets=closed) wired into tk next agent+planning paths; A/B/C skip-ahead e2e test passes
